from __future__ import annotations


def public_function_return_type_annotated_as_union_of_many_unrelated_types_positive(flag: int) -> int | str | dict[str, int] | list[int]:
    if flag == 0:
        return 0
    if flag == 1:
        return "one"
    if flag == 2:
        return {"two": 2}
    return [flag]
